name: Ahmed (Geb)
description:
"All of my life

There’s no one like you

All of my life

I’ve been waiting for you

Yes

I can’t imagine now

What my life is gonna be

If you can’t be right next to me"

-Ahmed, Soul Mate

Ahmed is a commander from the Esper Union, and a super idol of XHz. Ahmed is occasionally troubled by his inability to deal with people in private. This was compounded when he fell for one of the field agents working the Esper Union.

Note: Ahmed is a character from Dislyte, a mobile game that incorporates espers with the powers from various gods and heroes of different mythologies (Greek, Chinese, Egyptian, Japanese, Norse, etc.) that fight against against miramon and the Shadow Council.
creator: Calliopem
